metadata.title: Synaply - AI fi Spaced Repetition'n Jechoota Baradhu
metadata.description: Dandeettii afaan keetii spaced repetition AI'n deeggarameen guddisi. Tarree jechoota dhuunfaa uumi ykn tarree uummataa kanneen biroon qoodame irraa baradhu.
metadata.keywords: ingiliffa baradhu, spaced repetition, jechoota ijaaruu, flashcards, barumsa afaan AI, tarree jechoota, app barumsa afaanii, ispeenish baradhu, firaansay baradhu, jarmanii baradhu, dandeettii afaanii, jechoota qomatti qabachuu, barumsa SRS
metadata.og_description: Dandeettii afaan keetii spaced repetition AI'n deeggarameen guddisi. Ariitiin baradhu, yeroo dheeraaf yaadadhu.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI Language Learning App Interface
metadata.twitter_description: Jechoota kee bal'ifachuuf spaced repetition gariifi AI fayyadamuun Synaply'tti makami.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: {source} irraa {target} barachaa jirta
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Tarree jechoota uummataa fi playlist'oota fayyadamtoota biroo irraa ilaali.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Himoota AI'n mata-duree kamiyyuu ykn tarree jechoota kee irratti hundaa'uun uumaman hiikuun jechoota kee guddisi.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Jechoota walitti qabaa kee keessa jiran ilaali, barbaadi, gulaali ykn haqi.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Jecha haaraa kee ol-kaayuu hin dandeenye. Ammas tokko yaali!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Maaloo mata-duree filadhu ykn haala mataa keetii galchi.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI'n hiikkaa fi hima xumuraa irratti si gargaara
dashboard.delete_confirm: Jecha kana haquu akka barbaaddu mirkaneeffatteettaa?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Jechoota kee HUNDA haquu akka barbaaddu mirkaneeffatteettaa? Gochi kun duubatti deebi'uu hin danda'u.
dashboard.no_words_found: Jechoonni hin argamne. Jecha barbaacha biroo yaali ykn jechoota muraasa idda'i!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Jechoonni barachuuf argaman hin jiru. Maaloo dura tarree keetti jechoota haaraa idda'i!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Har'a jechoota irra-deebii gootu hin qabdu. Yeroo biroo deebi'i ykn jechoota haaraa idda'i!
dashboard.topic_placeholder: Mata-duree kamiyyuu galchi (fkn. mana nyaataa, qunnamtii, hojii)

onboarding.title: Baga Synaply'tti nagaan dhufte
onboarding.subtitle: Adeemsa barumsa afaan keetii spaced repetition AI'n deeggarameen jalqabi.
onboarding.step1_desc: Afaan barachuu barbaaddu fi afaan hiikkaa itti argachuu barbaaddu filadhu.
onboarding.step2_desc: Jechoota dhuunfaa kee idda'i ykn tarree uummataa keessaa filadhu.
onboarding.step3_desc: Algoritmiin keenya yeroo sirrii jechoota irra-deebii gochuu qabdu siif murteessa.

public_lists.title: Tarree Jechoota Uummataa
public_lists.author: Abbaa qopheesse
public_lists.copy_success: Tarreen milkaa'inaan gara jechoota keetti idda'ameera!

register.title: Galmaa'i
register.error: Galmaa'uun hin danda'amne. Maaloo ammas yaali.

help.title: Gargaarsa
help.about_desc: Synaply appii jechoota ittiin baratan kan spaced repetition fi AI fayyadamuun barumsa kee siif ariifachiisu dha.
help.srs_desc: Spaced repetition mala barumsaa kan yeroo barumsaa jechoota kanaan dura baratamanii gidduu jiru babal'isuu irratti hundaa'u dha. Kunis odeeffannoo yeroo dheeraaf qomatti qabachuuf si gargaara.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition Algorithm
spaced_repetition.description: Appiin keenya algoritmii SM-2 irratti hundaa'e fayyadama, kunis yeroo irra-deebii kee dhuunfatti siif sirreessa:

levels.review: Irra-deebii: Jechoota qomatti qabachuu kee mirkaneessuuf yeroo yeroon irra-deebii barbaadan.
levels.mastered: Dandeettii guutuu: Jechoota sirriitti yaadatamanii fi yeroo dheeraa booda irra-deebii barbaadan.
